nodes.label: Rationale: Quick Amount Suggestions
nodes.rationale: Quick amounts are dynamically generated based on current debt and today's price to speed up common transaction flows.

nodes.label: Rationale: Disable Hover Selection
nodes.rationale: Hover selection in search suggestions is disabled by default to prevent accidental selections on touch devices or busy UIs, favoring explicit click/enter.

nodes.label: Plan: Monolithic JS Bundle — Code Splitting
nodes.rationale: 拆分 328KB monolithic JS chunk 為 route-level lazy loading + vendor chunk splitting，減少 initial load JS ≥40%
nodes.norm_label: plan: monolithic js bundle — code splitting

nodes.label: Apps Script Sheets Sync Migration Plan (OBSOLETE)
nodes.norm_label: apps script sheets sync migration plan (obsolete)

nodes.label: Plan: App.tsx God Component 拆分
nodes.rationale: 將 App.tsx 拆分為 composition hook + sub-components，降低維護複雜度並提升程式碼可讀性
nodes.norm_label: plan: app.tsx god component 拆分

nodes.label: Plan: Render Performance Monitoring Infrastructure
nodes.rationale: 建立最小可行的效能監控基礎設施，包含開發環境 render tracking 與 POS 關鍵路徑延遲量測

nodes.label: Plan: 11 Component Unit Tests on Refactored Architecture
nodes.rationale: 為 11 個未測試的組件新增單元測試，優先考慮現金流相關組件
nodes.norm_label: plan: 11 component unit tests on refactored architecture

nodes.label: Plan: Store Actions Unit Test Coverage
nodes.norm_label: plan: store actions unit test coverage

nodes.label: Plan: Fix Components Bypassing Store with Direct Domain Imports
nodes.rationale: 消除 UI components 直接匯入 domain 層 runtime functions 的 pattern，建立清晰的架構邊界
nodes.norm_label: plan: fix components bypassing store with direct domain imports

nodes.label: Split Monolithic usePosStore — 執行計畫書
nodes.rationale: 將 544 行 God Store 按 concern 拆分為 persistence / types / domain action factories，保留單一 Zustand store 避免跨 store 原子性問題
nodes.norm_label: split monolithic useposstore — 執行計畫書

nodes.label: Plan: usePosFlow Hook 拆分
nodes.rationale: 將 345 行的 usePosFlow 按關注點拆分為 composition hook + 多個 sub-hooks 以提升模組化程度

nodes.label: Plan: 5 Custom Hooks Unit Test Coverage
nodes.rationale: 為零測試覆蓋率的 custom hooks 補齊單元測試，提升系統穩定性
nodes.norm_label: plan: 5 custom hooks unit test coverage
